prompt: A Japanese Edo-period ukiyo-e woodblock print style illustration of a lone figure descending a steep mountain path through fog, each step taking them lower into a valley. Bold black outlines, flat unmodulated color fields, muted indigo and ochre palette, diagonal composition, visible woodgrain texture, no text, no labels, traditional Japanese art style.
tradition_approach: Flat unmodulated color fields, bold black outlines, visible woodgrain texture, diagonal mountain composition, muted indigo and ochre palette typical of Hiroshige landscape prints.
